content_rights.rationale: NASA/SVS publishes the item under its public-domain-unless-noted baseline; partner credits and licensed music are preserved and media are not materialized.

transcript_rights.rationale: NASA/SVS publishes the exact VTT as an official same-group caption asset. Private preservation is provisional under the cited terms; partner-content and legal/policy review remain unresolved.

content_completeness.rationale: The official source publishes the associated transcript and the final cue reaches the source-media duration.

retention_and_derivation.rationale: Private caption-preservation evaluation only; no music, media, or partner footage is downloaded or republished.

third_party_caveats: Multiple licensed production-music tracks and partner credits remain source-page-only.

version_equivalence.evidence: The primary SVS group names VISIONS2_YouTube.mp4 and co-locates its VTT/SRT, official transcript, and exact YouTube link.
